name: hoc/mode-toggle-dropdown
description: A dropdown-style theme-mode selector HOC that presents Light, Dark, and System options inside a DropdownMenu rather than a single toggle button. Composed of Button and DropdownMenu primitives with locale-aware labels via ConfigProvider. Useful when space is limited or when more than two states need to be explicitly communicated to the user.
useCases: Compact headers where a single icon button opens a dropdown with explicit theme options
Onboarding wizards that ask the user to pick a visual preference during first-time setup
Preference modals that present all appearance settings in a unified dropdown group
Mobile navigation drawers that house theme selection alongside language and region options
